concepts.title: The Landing Page Leak Calculator: Find Your Exact $/Month Ad Waste
concepts.target_symptom: 3. Competitor complaint map: per-competitor complaints that passed the firewall, with source type
concepts.methodology_taught:
1. Message Match Audit - How to check if your traffic matches your promise
2. ROAS Cliff Detection - Finding the exact point where visitors drop off
3. CTA Friction Score - Measuring how many steps between interest and action
4. Trust Gap Calculation - Quantifying the moment visitors decide not to buy
concepts.bridge_to_offer: The calculator shows the leak, our Fix Pack plugs it. Once you see the exact dollar amount, $97 is trivial math vs continuing to bleed cash.

concepts.title: The Agency Testing Phase Survival Guide: How to Spot (and Avoid) Fake 'Strategy' Charges
concepts.target_symptom: The last person I paid said it was a testing phase for 3 months. I ended up with nothing and a lighter bank account.
concepts.methodology_taught:
1. Testing Phase vs Real Work - The 3 signals that separate strategy from stalling
2. Dollar-in, Dollar-out Accountability - How to demand proof before paying
3. Fast-Fix vs Slow-Discovery - Recognizing who will actually help vs who will bill hourly
4. Self-Serve vs Hand-Holding - When to pay for done-for-you vs when to DIY
concepts.bridge_to_offer: Our $97 Fix Pack is the anti-agency solution: specific diagnosis + same-day fix + dollar leak proof. No testing phase, no stalling, no bullshit.
concepts.format: Checklist + case studies + red flag detector

concepts.title: ROAS Cliff Repair: Plug the 4 Holes Killing Your Paid Traffic (Before You Spend Another $1k)
concepts.target_symptom: clicks but no sales, I have no idea what's broken
concepts.methodology_taught:
1. Hook-to-LP Gap Diagnosis - Why visitors click but don't convert
2. Above-Fold Conversion Surgery - Fixing the 5-second test failure
3. Offer Clarity Score - Making your promise impossible to misunderstand
4. CPM Creep Relief - Lowering your cost per click with better message match
concepts.bridge_to_offer: Our implementation service fixes all 4 holes in 2 hours, guaranteed. The manual shows you what's broken, we fix it while you focus on your business.
